Welcome to HealthGov Intelligence

A unified, state-of-the-art administrative portal linking district health overview, predictive analytics, medical inventory forecasts, and patient queues.

1. Secure Admin Login

End-to-end encrypted administrative authentication portal utilizing Tailwind CSS forms.

Control Panel monitoring Telemetry

2. District Telemetry

Real-time health center analytics map, medical alerts feed, and regional telemetry grid.

Predictive Engine psychology AI-Driven

3. Health Predictions

Outbreak predictions, patient surge load calculations, and automated prescriptive action items.

4. City PHC Center Details

Local duty rosters, live consultation token queues, active staff details, and bed status.

5. Medicine Stock & Forecast

Stock levels tracking, critical stock alerts, batch expiry analysis, and AI-suggested transfers.
